title: VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES - 211info
text: SOUTH SALEM VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF ODHS Vocational Rehabilitation (VR) assists individuals with disabilities in getting and keeping jobs that match their skills, interests, and abilities. VR services include vocational counseling, evaluation, physical restoration, skills training, job placement, and preparation for independent living. Services are provided in collaboration with businesses, state agencies, community rehabilitation programs, and independent living service providers. 1900 Hines Street SE Suite 150 Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: Must have a documented physical, mental, or emotional condition that makes it difficult to get or keep a job Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 378-2483 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 378-2483 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Documentation regarding disability LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County Services: Comprehensive Disability Related Employment Programs Job Development * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Vocational Rehabilitation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SOUTH SALEM VOCATIONAL REHABILITATION
